relabels.title: Garante per la protezione dei dati personali v. Replika (Luka Inc.)
relabels.rationale: Luka/Replika is the AI as product (consistent with L1-104, L6-108). v0.4 labeled this case 'deployer' inconsistently with sibling cases on the same company. v0.5 corrects to 'ai_provider' under the documented rule.
